TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == lunukay kazizeng Ťá™Ť°ĆŤĽä lunukay kazizeng uyza u emekenay nu tademaw a adidi'ay cayay ku nu kikayay kazizeng. kamu nu layak "katacya" han ayaw tusa zikuz tuusa ku bihel masilac mahatatusa ku bihel nu kazizang, "bicycle", nika iza ku tuluay a bihel iza ku cacayay a bihelan. u kalamkam nu nipakazizeng pakala tu 15-25 kung-li "9.3-15.5 ing-li, caliway tu piecaw tu miunduay tu pabatikalay, asaca maawas ku pihinaba nu uzip mikitadu culil nu mali, a katukuh 45 kung-li ku kalamkam "28 ing-li". namahini, lunukay kazizeng namapala u sapilais. . nilaculan Tayw-wan, macalap tu kadademecan hawsa u lunukay kazizeng u pahuyanyan kazizeng han. i 1963 a mihcaan Cong-hwa-min-kow a cen-bu patizeng tu lunukay kazizeng a kalalecad undu sye-huy, itawya patatungus tu šłÄšļĆšłČpahuyanyan demiad nu cen-ce a kawaw, pangangan han tu "lunukay kazizeng" sumad tu ngangan "pahuyanyan kazizeng", patizeng tu Cong-hwa-min-kow pahuyanyan kazizeng a wi-yen huy" "Cong-hwa-min-kow pahuyanyan kazizeng sye-huy. 1766 a mihcaan, sabeleng nu mikilulay tu kamisama i pisakapah tu Ta-wen-si i 1490 a mihcaan a nisulitan hawsa, maazih ku saayaway adidi'ay emekenay a kazizeng, nika caay kalaheci ku nisanga'an, tiza pizateng dada'. Ba-kow a tademaw ci Si-bu-la-ke "Comte de Sivrac" i kaudadan, i zazan macaliwayay ku sedpatay bihel a kazizeng mapatesi' nu lanu', namatapesi' bahel mazateng satu niza, ahebal kuyni sepatay bihel a kazizeng, huntu duduc han palatusa ku kazizeng, sepat ku bihen pala tusaen ku hihel nu kazizeng nuayawan zikuzanen. uyza i 1791 a mihcaan, u saayaway a saculil nu "kilang nisanga' subayu a bihel" izaw satu ku adidi'ay a kazizeng. uyni adidi'ay a kazizeng zikuz nuayawan tusa nu kilangay ku bihel. Teban mitules tu mibalatay a muyaw, pabaw sipaeneng tu cacay a aenengan, mahiza u sasalamaan. uyni "kilang nisanga' subayu a bihel" kanahatu nayi' ku salineng tu lyen-tyaw, nayi' aca ku nisanga' tu handulu, nika mala u sumamaday nu saayaway nu tademaw a lunukay kazizeng. 1817 a mihcaan, Te-kow a Ka-al-te-lay-s "Karl Drais" misanga' tu cacay tusaay bihel a kazizeng, i ayaw nu bihel cunusen niza tu cacay aikecay sapiwan tu pasayzaan, taneng masumad ku pasayzaan taayaw. nika paculil sa mahiza tu tusaay a kuku' ku miemekay, kya macuzuh taayaw makulud ku kazizeng. 1840 a mihcaan, Su-ke-lan nu misamukinay ci May-ke-mi-lun "Kirkpatrick Macmillan", i Te-lay-s nisanga'an tu kilangay bihel a kazizeng u nisumadan. i zikuzayay bihel a kowsyung laculan niza tu ci-pin, hiyanen aca tu lyen-ka a ci-pin atu patatules nuayaway asaemek, saaca hatu u mukin ku nisanga'an tu zikuzay nuayawan a bihel, tabaki ku nuayaway a bihel, adidi' ku zikuzayay a bihel. mahiniay tatenga'ay tu miliyas i lala' ku tusaay a kuku', tusaay a kuku' makakutay miemek ku tusaay a kuku' mikelid malineng ku bihel a talaayaw muculil ku kazizang. 1842 a mihcaan, ci May-ke-mi-lun mikacaw tu mahiniay a kazizeng, cacay a demiad 20 kung-li ku niculilan. sumamad i 1868 a mihcaan, kahulamanay a Sang-hay tahkal tu ku lunukay kazizeng, batikal nu saayaway a nipangangan u "yang-ma-al" han. sakay Cong-kow hawsa, "yang-ma-al" u baluhay a tuud. itawyaay a nipatahkal a cudan "tyen-s-cay-hwa-paw kinapinatu sibatikalay nu tau a kanatal palasinbun hantu. 1922 a mihcaan u Cong-bwa-min-kowan, nipahungtian ci Pow-I malaacawa sa, u pulusadak a kakama niza ci Pow-cya pabelien niza tu cacay a batikal. kaynah han nu sakakaay ci Pow-cya, sakamu sa huntu acaay pabelien tu hungti tu katalawan a tuud. nika caay paengil ci Pow-I tu kabinad nu sakakaay, caay kapina a demiad matineng tu pabatikal, mala nu Cong-kow likisi nu uyza cacayay nu matinengay pabatikal a hungti nu Congj-kow. nipatayza i " Syang-kang ku batikal a demian caay kahapinang. "tancya" mala u saculilan nu binawlan u sapiedap tu saculilan, macaliway tu ku140 a mihcaan, makay Syang-kang palahad i liwliw nu tukay, palabu tu 'tan cya" lekal, "tancya a lalangawan" haymaw satu madengdeng. namakay madengdeng ku Facebook, caay kalecad ku pisalunguc a palahad tu lunukay kazizeng haymaw palahad ku sakapu, patinaku tu sitinengay a tademaw atu misyekiay i Syang-kang a satalakaway a Ta-maw-san-tin-ca nipatizengan tu "tancya mikinaulay tu hekal a sakaput", u lunukay kazizeng sapidang atu angangan u salungan a hekal, patinak tu lalangawan nu midangay lunukay kazizeng, micuzuh tu lunukay a kazizeng a zazan atu kalalacan nu salungan nu hekal. Taywan a batikal kalingatuan sa i kaZipunan a ziday, duduc tu kamu nu Zipun pangangan han tu linengsanay a kazizeng", izaw ku nipangangan tu "tyey-ma". 1898 a mihcaan, saayaway nu Zipun a kusi tu linengsanay a kazizeng "kung-tyen-ce-cung-sow' "nisanga'an nu kanatal a batikal pabelien ku hungti, u cayay ku malepunay a batikal patayni han i Taywan. . 1900 a mihca 10 a bulad 5 a demiaday a sinbun patahkalen ku nakahabelut nu linengsanay a kazizeng, malecaday Kwang-kaw malingatu tu tahkal i sinbunan a cudad, itayaway i Tay-pey kuwan pye-men "ayzaay a pye-min zazan" nu patiyamay tu tuki "cyen-cun-ce patiyamay" pahanbay tu lineng sayay a kazizeng, pakatineng tu binawlan mala u saculilan, u sakaput "yen-cen-huy" pabatikal tahkal muculil midang, u aca, nu Ameylikaay a tuud kikayasuyan tu nu Zipun. 1900ŚĻī10śúą5 . 1905 a mihca 9 a bulad, likisi nu Taywan u saayaway makidem a batikal u sabatikalay a tademaw ci Yen-cen-sen mapatahkal i sinbun. duduc tu piasip nu Cung-tung-bu, 1930 a ziday, Taywan paytulu a luma'an izaw tu ku cacay a batikal, u madayumay tu, itawyaay a siyasing tahkal ku zazan nu patiyamay "tingaka" i cuwacuwa maazih ku micakay anca patayzaay tu pipazengan tu nikacawan a batikal. zikuz namalepacaw Cong-hwa-min-kow cen-bu malimad i Taywan, "lunukay kazizeng", "batikal" nakamu tayza tu i Taywan, kamu nu tademaw amin mapelu' ku lyena u "laklyen" han "pangiha nu layak". 1990 a mihcaa, Taywan mala kahenulay nu misannga'ay tu batikal i kitakitay, macalap macaliway ku 50%. Taywan a lunukay kazizeng kalalecadan a kawaw pakala tu 700 a lumaan', lunukay kazizewng a kusi i 2014 a mihcaan nisanga'an a kalisiw katukah Taywan a kalisiw tu 872.5 walwalen, sakatusa ku nipasilsil tu ngangan i kitakit. 1990ŚĻīšĽ£, 2. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

tuusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ masir~…ĺa ¶ mańßatatusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ nu kazizaŇč, "bi ¶j ¶r~…ĺ…ô", nika iza ku tur~…ĺuaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ iza ku ¶a ¶ajaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺan. u kar~…ĺamkam nu nipakaziz…ôŇč pakar~…ĺa tu ¶aan, kańßur~…ĺamanaj a saŇč-ńßaj tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč, batikar~…ĺ nu saajawaj a nipaŇčaŇčan u "jaŇč-ma-ar~…ĺ" ńßan. sakaj ¶oŇč-kow ńßawsa, "jaŇč-ma-ar~…ĺ" u bar~…ĺuńßaj a tuud. itawjaaj a nipatańßkar~…ĺ a ¶udan "tj…ôn-s- ¶aj-ńßwa-paw kinapinatu sibatikar~…ĺaj nu tau a kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺasinbun ńßantu. **** a mińß ¶aan u ¶oŇč-bwa-min-kowan, nipańßuŇčtian ¶i pow-i mar~…ĺaa ¶awa sa, u pur~…ĺusadak a kakama niza ¶i pow- ¶ja pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn niza tu ¶a ¶aj a batikar~…ĺ. kajnańß ńßan nu sakakaaj ¶i pow- ¶ja, sakamu sa ńßuntu a ¶aaj pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn tu ńßuŇčti tu katar~…ĺawan a tuud. nika ¶aaj pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i pow-i tu kabinad nu sakakaaj, ¶aaj kapina a d…ômiad matin…ôŇč tu pabatikar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa nu ¶oŇč-kow r~…ĺikisi nu ujza ¶a ¶ajaj nu matin…ôŇčaj pabatikar~…ĺ a ńßuŇčti nu ¶oŇčj-kow. nipatajza i " sjaŇč-kaŇč ku batikar~…ĺ a d…ômian ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč. r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, "tan ¶ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" ńßajmaw satu mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč. namakaj mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč ku fa ¶…ôbook, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pisar~…ĺuŇču ¶ a par~…ĺańßad tu r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč ńßajmaw par~…ĺańßad ku sakapu, patinaku tu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw atu misj…ôkiaj i sjaŇč-kaŇč a satar~…ĺakawaj a ta-maw-san-tin- ¶a nipatiz…ôŇčan tu "tan ¶ja mikinaur~…ĺaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a sakaput", u r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč sapidaŇč atu aŇčaŇčan u sar~…ĺuŇčan a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, patinak tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu midaŇčaj r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč, mi ¶uzuńß tu r~…ĺunukaj a kaziz…ôŇč a zazan atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶an nu sar~…ĺuŇčan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. tajwan a batikar~…ĺ kar~…ĺiŇčatuan sa i kazipunan a zidaj, dudu ¶ tu kamu nu zipun paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč", izaw ku nipaŇčaŇčan tu "tj…ô-ma". **** a mińß ¶aan, saajawaj nu zipun a kusi tu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč "kuŇč-tj…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶uŇč-sow Ē~ ° "nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu kanatar~…ĺ a batikar~…ĺ pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku ńßuŇčti, u ¶ajaj ku mar~…ĺ…ôpunaj a batikar~…ĺ patajni ńßan i tajwan. . **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiadaj a sinbun patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn ku nakańßab…ôr~…ĺut nu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kwaŇč-kaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu tańßkar~…ĺ i sinbunan a ¶udad, itajawaj i taj-p…ô kuwan pj…ô-m…ôn "ajzaaj a pj…ô-min zazan" nu patijamaj tu tuki " ¶j…ôn- ¶un- ¶…ô patijamaj" pańßanbaj tu r~…ĺin…ôŇč sajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, pakatin…ôŇč tu binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺa u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, u sakaput "j…ôn- ¶…ôn-ńßuj" pabatikar~…ĺ tańßkar~…ĺ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ midaŇč, u a ¶a, nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a tuud kikajasujan tu nu zipun. ********* . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺikisi nu tajwan u saajawaj makid…ôm a batikar~…ĺ u sabatikar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw ¶i j…ôn- ¶…ôn-s…ôn mapatańßkar~…ĺ i sinbun. dudu ¶ tu piasip nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč-bu, **** a zidaj, tajwan pajtur~…ĺu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an izaw tu ku ¶a ¶aj a batikar~…ĺ, u madajumaj tu, itawjaaj a sijasiŇč tańßkar~…ĺ ku zazan nu patijamaj "tiŇčaka" i ¶uwa ¶uwa maazińß ku mi ¶akaj an ¶a patajzaaj tu pipaz…ôŇčan tu nika ¶awan a batikar~…ĺ. zikuz namar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw ¶oŇč-ńßwa-min-kow ¶…ôn-bu mar~…ĺimad i tajwan, "r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč", "batikar~…ĺ" nakamu tajza tu i tajwan, kamu nu tad…ômaw amin map…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺj…ôna u "r~…ĺakr~…ĺj…ôn" ńßan "paŇčińßa nu r~…ĺajak". **** a mińß ¶aa, tajwan mar~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺaj nu misanŇča Ē~ °aj tu batikar~…ĺ i kitakitaj, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku **%. tajwan a r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan a kawaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** a r~…ĺumaan Ē~ °, r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôwŇč a kusi i **** a mińß ¶aan nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kar~…ĺisiw katukańß tajwan a kar~…ĺisiw tu ***.* war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn, sakatusa ku nipasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ tu ŇčaŇčan i kitakit. ******, *. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == lunukay kazizeng Ťá™Ť°ĆŤĽä lunukay kazizeng uyza u emekenay nu tademaw a adidi'ay cayay ku nu kikayay kazizeng. kamu nu layak "katacya" han ayaw tusa zikuz tuusa ku bihel masilac mahatatusa ku bihel nu kazizang, "bicycle", nika iza ku tuluay a bihel iza ku cacayay a bihelan. u kalamkam nu nipakazizeng pakala tu 15-25 kung-li "9.3-15.5 ing-li, caliway tu piecaw tu miunduay tu pabatikalay, asaca maawas ku pihinaba nu uzip mikitadu culil nu mali, a katukuh 45 kung-li ku kalamkam "28 ing-li". namahini, lunukay kazizeng namapala u sapilais. . nilaculan Tayw-wan, macalap tu kadademecan hawsa u lunukay kazizeng u pahuyanyan kazizeng han. i 1963 a mihcaan Cong-hwa-min-kow a cen-bu patizeng tu lunukay kazizeng a kalalecad undu sye-huy, itawya patatungus tu šłÄšļĆšłČpahuyanyan demiad nu cen-ce a kawaw, pangangan han tu "lunukay kazizeng" sumad tu ngangan "pahuyanyan kazizeng", patizeng tu Cong-hwa-min-kow pahuyanyan kazizeng a wi-yen huy" "Cong-hwa-min-kow pahuyanyan kazizeng sye-huy. 1766 a mihcaan, sabeleng nu mikilulay tu kamisama i pisakapah tu Ta-wen-si i 1490 a mihcaan a nisulitan hawsa, maazih ku saayaway adidi'ay emekenay a kazizeng, nika caay kalaheci ku nisanga'an, tiza pizateng dada'. Ba-kow a tademaw ci Si-bu-la-ke "Comte de Sivrac" i kaudadan, i zazan macaliwayay ku sedpatay bihel a kazizeng mapatesi' nu lanu', namatapesi' bahel mazateng satu niza, ahebal kuyni sepatay bihel a kazizeng, huntu duduc han palatusa ku kazizeng, sepat ku bihen pala tusaen ku hihel nu kazizeng nuayawan zikuzanen. uyza i 1791 a mihcaan, u saayaway a saculil nu "kilang nisanga' subayu a bihel" izaw satu ku adidi'ay a kazizeng. uyni adidi'ay a kazizeng zikuz nuayawan tusa nu kilangay ku bihel. Teban mitules tu mibalatay a muyaw, pabaw sipaeneng tu cacay a aenengan, mahiza u sasalamaan. uyni "kilang nisanga' subayu a bihel" kanahatu nayi' ku salineng tu lyen-tyaw, nayi' aca ku nisanga' tu handulu, nika mala u sumamaday nu saayaway nu tademaw a lunukay kazizeng. 1817 a mihcaan, Te-kow a Ka-al-te-lay-s "Karl Drais" misanga' tu cacay tusaay bihel a kazizeng, i ayaw nu bihel cunusen niza tu cacay aikecay sapiwan tu pasayzaan, taneng masumad ku pasayzaan taayaw. nika paculil sa mahiza tu tusaay a kuku' ku miemekay, kya macuzuh taayaw makulud ku kazizeng. 1840 a mihcaan, Su-ke-lan nu misamukinay ci May-ke-mi-lun "Kirkpatrick Macmillan", i Te-lay-s nisanga'an tu kilangay bihel a kazizeng u nisumadan. i zikuzayay bihel a kowsyung laculan niza tu ci-pin, hiyanen aca tu lyen-ka a ci-pin atu patatules nuayaway asaemek, saaca hatu u mukin ku nisanga'an tu zikuzay nuayawan a bihel, tabaki ku nuayaway a bihel, adidi' ku zikuzayay a bihel. mahiniay tatenga'ay tu miliyas i lala' ku tusaay a kuku', tusaay a kuku' makakutay miemek ku tusaay a kuku' mikelid malineng ku bihel a talaayaw muculil ku kazizang. 1842 a mihcaan, ci May-ke-mi-lun mikacaw tu mahiniay a kazizeng, cacay a demiad 20 kung-li ku niculilan. sumamad i 1868 a mihcaan, kahulamanay a Sang-hay tahkal tu ku lunukay kazizeng, batikal nu saayaway a nipangangan u "yang-ma-al" han. sakay Cong-kow hawsa, "yang-ma-al" u baluhay a tuud. itawyaay a nipatahkal a cudan "tyen-s-cay-hwa-paw kinapinatu sibatikalay nu tau a kanatal palasinbun hantu. 1922 a mihcaan u Cong-bwa-min-kowan, nipahungtian ci Pow-I malaacawa sa, u pulusadak a kakama niza ci Pow-cya pabelien niza tu cacay a batikal. kaynah han nu sakakaay ci Pow-cya, sakamu sa huntu acaay pabelien tu hungti tu katalawan a tuud. nika caay paengil ci Pow-I tu kabinad nu sakakaay, caay kapina a demiad matineng tu pabatikal, mala nu Cong-kow likisi nu uyza cacayay nu matinengay pabatikal a hungti nu Congj-kow. nipatayza i " Syang-kang ku batikal a demian caay kahapinang. "tancya" mala u saculilan nu binawlan u sapiedap tu saculilan, macaliway tu ku140 a mihcaan, makay Syang-kang palahad i liwliw nu tukay, palabu tu 'tan cya" lekal, "tancya a lalangawan" haymaw satu madengdeng. namakay madengdeng ku Facebook, caay kalecad ku pisalunguc a palahad tu lunukay kazizeng haymaw palahad ku sakapu, patinaku tu sitinengay a tademaw atu misyekiay i Syang-kang a satalakaway a Ta-maw-san-tin-ca nipatizengan tu "tancya mikinaulay tu hekal a sakaput", u lunukay kazizeng sapidang atu angangan u salungan a hekal, patinak tu lalangawan nu midangay lunukay kazizeng, micuzuh tu lunukay a kazizeng a zazan atu kalalacan nu salungan nu hekal. Taywan a batikal kalingatuan sa i kaZipunan a ziday, duduc tu kamu nu Zipun pangangan han tu linengsanay a kazizeng", izaw ku nipangangan tu "tyey-ma". 1898 a mihcaan, saayaway nu Zipun a kusi tu linengsanay a kazizeng "kung-tyen-ce-cung-sow' "nisanga'an nu kanatal a batikal pabelien ku hungti, u cayay ku malepunay a batikal patayni han i Taywan. . 1900 a mihca 10 a bulad 5 a demiaday a sinbun patahkalen ku nakahabelut nu linengsanay a kazizeng, malecaday Kwang-kaw malingatu tu tahkal i sinbunan a cudad, itayaway i Tay-pey kuwan pye-men "ayzaay a pye-min zazan" nu patiyamay tu tuki "cyen-cun-ce patiyamay" pahanbay tu lineng sayay a kazizeng, pakatineng tu binawlan mala u saculilan, u sakaput "yen-cen-huy" pabatikal tahkal muculil midang, u aca, nu Ameylikaay a tuud kikayasuyan tu nu Zipun. 1900ŚĻī10śúą5 . 1905 a mihca 9 a bulad, likisi nu Taywan u saayaway makidem a batikal u sabatikalay a tademaw ci Yen-cen-sen mapatahkal i sinbun. duduc tu piasip nu Cung-tung-bu, 1930 a ziday, Taywan paytulu a luma'an izaw tu ku cacay a batikal, u madayumay tu, itawyaay a siyasing tahkal ku zazan nu patiyamay "tingaka" i cuwacuwa maazih ku micakay anca patayzaay tu pipazengan tu nikacawan a batikal. zikuz namalepacaw Cong-hwa-min-kow cen-bu malimad i Taywan, "lunukay kazizeng", "batikal" nakamu tayza tu i Taywan, kamu nu tademaw amin mapelu' ku lyena u "laklyen" han "pangiha nu layak". 1990 a mihcaa, Taywan mala kahenulay nu misannga'ay tu batikal i kitakitay, macalap macaliway ku 50%. Taywan a lunukay kazizeng kalalecadan a kawaw pakala tu 700 a lumaan', lunukay kazizewng a kusi i 2014 a mihcaan nisanga'an a kalisiw katukah Taywan a kalisiw tu 872.5 walwalen, sakatusa ku nipasilsil tu ngangan i kitakit. 1990ŚĻīšĽ£, 2. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč *** r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč ujza u …ôm…ôk…ônaj nu tad…ômaw a adidi Ē~ °aj ¶ajaj ku nu kikajaj kaziz…ôŇč. kamu nu r~…ĺajak "kata ¶ja" ńßan ajaw tusa zikuz tuusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ masir~…ĺa ¶ mańßatatusa ku bińß…ôr~…ĺ nu kazizaŇč, "bi ¶j ¶r~…ĺ…ô", nika iza ku tur~…ĺuaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺ iza ku ¶a ¶ajaj a bińß…ôr~…ĺan. u kar~…ĺamkam nu nipakaziz…ôŇč pakar~…ĺa tu **-** kuŇč-r~…ĺi "*.*-**.* iŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu pi…ô ¶aw tu miunduaj tu pabatikar~…ĺaj, asa ¶a maawas ku pińßinaba nu uzip mikitadu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu mar~…ĺi, a katukuńß ** kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku kar~…ĺamkam "** iŇč-r~…ĺi". namańßini, r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč namapar~…ĺa u sapir~…ĺais. . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tajw-wan, ma ¶ar~…ĺap tu kadad…ôm…ô ¶an ńßawsa u r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč u pańßujanjan kaziz…ôŇč ńßan. i **** ¶aan, kańßur~…ĺamanaj a saŇč-ńßaj tańßkar~…ĺ tu ku r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč, batikar~…ĺ nu saajawaj a nipaŇčaŇčan u "jaŇč-ma-ar~…ĺ" ńßan. sakaj ¶oŇč-kow ńßawsa, "jaŇč-ma-ar~…ĺ" u bar~…ĺuńßaj a tuud. itawjaaj a nipatańßkar~…ĺ a ¶udan "tj…ôn-s- ¶aj-ńßwa-paw kinapinatu sibatikar~…ĺaj nu tau a kanatar~…ĺ par~…ĺasinbun ńßantu. **** a mińß ¶aan u ¶oŇč-bwa-min-kowan, nipańßuŇčtian ¶i pow-i mar~…ĺaa ¶awa sa, u pur~…ĺusadak a kakama niza ¶i pow- ¶ja pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn niza tu ¶a ¶aj a batikar~…ĺ. kajnańß ńßan nu sakakaaj ¶i pow- ¶ja, sakamu sa ńßuntu a ¶aaj pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn tu ńßuŇčti tu katar~…ĺawan a tuud. nika ¶aaj pa…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i pow-i tu kabinad nu sakakaaj, ¶aaj kapina a d…ômiad matin…ôŇč tu pabatikar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa nu ¶oŇč-kow r~…ĺikisi nu ujza ¶a ¶ajaj nu matin…ôŇčaj pabatikar~…ĺ a ńßuŇčti nu ¶oŇčj-kow. nipatajza i " sjaŇč-kaŇč ku batikar~…ĺ a d…ômian ¶aaj kańßapinaŇč. r~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ, "tan ¶ja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan" ńßajmaw satu mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč. namakaj mad…ôŇčd…ôŇč ku fa ¶…ôbook, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pisar~…ĺuŇču ¶ a par~…ĺańßad tu r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč ńßajmaw par~…ĺańßad ku sakapu, patinaku tu sitin…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw atu misj…ôkiaj i sjaŇč-kaŇč a satar~…ĺakawaj a ta-maw-san-tin- ¶a nipatiz…ôŇčan tu "tan ¶ja mikinaur~…ĺaj tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a sakaput", u r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč sapidaŇč atu aŇčaŇčan u sar~…ĺuŇčan a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, patinak tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu midaŇčaj r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč, mi ¶uzuńß tu r~…ĺunukaj a kaziz…ôŇč a zazan atu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶an nu sar~…ĺuŇčan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. tajwan a batikar~…ĺ kar~…ĺiŇčatuan sa i kazipunan a zidaj, dudu ¶ tu kamu nu zipun paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč", izaw ku nipaŇčaŇčan tu "tj…ô-ma". **** a mińß ¶aan, saajawaj nu zipun a kusi tu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč "kuŇč-tj…ôn- ¶…ô- ¶uŇč-sow Ē~ ° "nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu kanatar~…ĺ a batikar~…ĺ pab…ôr~…ĺi…ôn ku ńßuŇčti, u ¶ajaj ku mar~…ĺ…ôpunaj a batikar~…ĺ patajni ńßan i tajwan. . **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiadaj a sinbun patańßkar~…ĺ…ôn ku nakańßab…ôr~…ĺut nu r~…ĺin…ôŇčsanaj a kaziz…ôŇč, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj kwaŇč-kaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu tańßkar~…ĺ i sinbunan a ¶udad, itajawaj i taj-p…ô kuwan pj…ô-m…ôn "ajzaaj a pj…ô-min zazan" nu patijamaj tu tuki " ¶j…ôn- ¶un- ¶…ô patijamaj" pańßanbaj tu r~…ĺin…ôŇč sajaj a kaziz…ôŇč, pakatin…ôŇč tu binawr~…ĺan mar~…ĺa u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, u sakaput "j…ôn- ¶…ôn-ńßuj" pabatikar~…ĺ tańßkar~…ĺ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ midaŇč, u a ¶a, nu am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a tuud kikajasujan tu nu zipun. ********* . **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, r~…ĺikisi nu tajwan u saajawaj makid…ôm a batikar~…ĺ u sabatikar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw ¶i j…ôn- ¶…ôn-s…ôn mapatańßkar~…ĺ i sinbun. dudu ¶ tu piasip nu ¶uŇč-tuŇč-bu, **** a zidaj, tajwan pajtur~…ĺu a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an izaw tu ku ¶a ¶aj a batikar~…ĺ, u madajumaj tu, itawjaaj a sijasiŇč tańßkar~…ĺ ku zazan nu patijamaj "tiŇčaka" i ¶uwa ¶uwa maazińß ku mi ¶akaj an ¶a patajzaaj tu pipaz…ôŇčan tu nika ¶awan a "r~…ĺakr~…ĺj…ôn" ńßan "paŇčińßa nu r~…ĺajak". **** a mińß ¶aa, tajwan mar~…ĺa kańß…ônur~…ĺaj nu misanŇča Ē~ °aj tu batikar~…ĺ i kitakitaj, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku **%. tajwan a r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôŇč kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan a kawaw pakar~…ĺa tu *** a r~…ĺumaan Ē~ °, r~…ĺunukaj kaziz…ôwŇč a kusi i **** a mińß ¶aan nisaŇča Ē~ °an a kar~…ĺisiw katukańß tajwan a kar~…ĺisiw tu ***.* war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn, sakatusa ku nipasir~…ĺsir~…ĺ tu ŇčaŇčan i kitakit. ******, *. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
